# Data Model Checklist: Provide Health Checks and Service Metrics

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover health responses and metrics aggregates.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/031-health-service-metrics/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Health response captures overall status and dependency breakdown.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Metrics output captures request/error counts and latency aggregates.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Dependency status captures stale ingestion as degraded.
